name: Sausage Cups
recipeIngredient: 1 pound ground sausage, cooked and crumbled
24 each phyllo tarts or tart shells
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt margarine and cook onion until soft.
2. Add mushrooms, olives, salt, and pepper. Cook until the vegetables are tender.
3. Sprinkle flour over the mixture and stir constantly to avoid lumps.
4. Gradually pour in the heavy whipping cream while stirring continuously.
5. Bring the mixture to a boil and add the cooked sausage.
6. Reduce heat and simmer until thickened.
7. Prebake the shells if needed.
8. Fill each dough cup with the sauce mixture.
9. Sprinkle parmesan cheese on top of each filling.
10. Bake at 350°F for 10 minutes or until the cheese is melted.
